metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Daniel Barta

plugins.name: git-poster
plugins.description: Generate creative poster-style visualizations of git contributions

plugins.name: billingo
plugins.description: Manage invoices, partners, products, and expenses via the Billingo Hungarian invoicing API

plugins.name: apple-notes
plugins.description: Access and manage Apple Notes — list, create, read, update, delete, search, tag, batch operations, export, and organize

plugins.name: dev-conventions
plugins.description: General development conventions automatically injected into every session

plugins.name: conventional-commits
plugins.description: Enforce conventional commit messages and set up commitlint + husky git hooks

plugins.name: image-optimizer
plugins.description: Automatically downsize and compress images from MCP tools to reduce session size

plugins.name: bell
plugins.description: Play a configurable sound when Claude Code finishes responding. Run /bell:configure to choose a sound or disable it.

plugins.name: my-settings
plugins.description: Sync global Claude Code settings (model, env, status line, MCP servers, plugins) from a reference config via /sync-my-settings
